1. WebSearch for "BlueprintJS 6 design system best practices 2025"
2. WebSearch for "BlueprintJS dark theme implementation"
3. WebSearch for "BlueprintJS data visualization dashboard"
4. WebFetch the official BlueprintJS documentation

Return:
- Color palette and tokens
- Spacing system
- Typography guidelines
- Component patterns for dashboards
- Dark theme implementation guide
- Best practices for data-heavy applications

Web search results for query: "BlueprintJS data visualization dashboard"

Links: [{"title":"Setting up the dashboard structure - Palantir Blueprint JS: Building Robust UI Applications | StudyRaid","url":"https://app.studyraid.com/en/read/15048/520734/setting-up-the-dashboard-structure"},{"title":"Blueprint – Documentation","url":"https://blueprintjs.com/docs/"},{"title":"GitHub Dashboard for blueprint by palantir","url":"https://chart.ly/github-dashboard/palantir/blueprint"},{"title":"Implementing data visualization components - Palantir Blueprint JS: Building Robust UI Applications | StudyRaid","url":"https://app.studyraid.com/en/read/15048/520735/implementing-data-visualization-components"},{"title":"Blueprint – A React-based UI toolkit for the web","url":"https://blueprintjs.com/"},{"title":"GitHub - MirrorBottle/blueprintjs-dashboard: Admin Dashboard using Blueprintjs","url":"https://github.com/MirrorBottle/blueprintjs-dashboard"},{"title":"Blueprint, React-based UI toolkit by Made with React","url":"https://madewithreact.com/blueprint-react-based-ui-toolkit/"},{"title":"BlueprintJS - GeeksforGeeks","url":"https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/blueprintjs/"},{"title":"Blueprint.js by Rasmus Gripenfrid | Dribbble","url":"https://dribbble.com/ralle/collections/1558520-Blueprint-js"},{"title":"Plottable - Palantir","url":"http://plottablejs.org/"}]

Here are the results for your search on "BlueprintJS data visualization dashboard":

## Overview

Blueprint is a React-based UI toolkit for the web.(no content)It's an open source project developed at Palantir.(no content)It is optimized for building complex, data-dense web interfaces for desktop applications.

## Dashboard Structure with BlueprintJS

You can use the `Navbar` and `NavbarGroup` components from `@blueprintjs/core` to create dashboard headers. The `fixedToTop` prop keeps the header anchored during scrolling, and `NavbarGroup` sections enable left/right content alignment through alignment props.(no content)For the main layout, you can divide the central workspace into a sidebar and visualization panel using `Card` components with a Grid system. The `elevation={2}` prop adds depth to data panels, and nested Grid components can be used for responsive internal layouts.

## Data Visualization Components

Blueprint JS provides LineChart, BarSeries, and Axis components for data rendering. These can be configured with dataset mappings to display trends. The LineChart requires xAxis/yAxis definitions and dataSeries containing numerical arrays.(no content)Wrap visualizations in ChartContainer for coordinated tooltips. The content prop formats tooltip data using the nearest datapoint.(no content)You can bind charts to container dimensions using ResizeSensor and combine with useState to dynamically update chart dimensions when parent elements resize.

## Related Resources

- There's a GitHub repository called "blueprintjs-dashboard" that provides an Admin Dashboard using Blueprintjs.
- Plottable (also by Palantir) offers flexible, interactive, performant charts for the web.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Web search results for query: "BlueprintJS 6 design system best practices 2025"

Links: [{"title":"GitHub - palantir/blueprint: A React-based UI toolkit for the web","url":"https://github.com/palantir/blueprint"},{"title":"Blueprint – Documentation","url":"https://blueprintjs.com/docs/"},{"title":"Blueprint 6.0","url":"https://github.com/palantir/blueprint/wiki/Blueprint-6.0"},{"title":"Blueprint – A React-based UI toolkit for the web","url":"https://blueprintjs.com/"},{"title":"Blueprint JS design system | Figma","url":"https://www.figma.com/community/file/1178851446892338192/blueprint-js-design-system"},{"title":"Palantir / Projects / Blueprint | Dribbble","url":"https://dribbble.com/Palantir/projects/451877-Blueprint"},{"title":"Blueprint UI","url":"https://blueprintui.dev/"},{"title":"Scaling product design with Blueprint | by Palantir | Palantir Blog","url":"https://blog.palantir.com/scaling-product-design-with-blueprint-25492827bb4a"},{"title":"Design Systems Blueprints","url":"https://designsystems.surf/blueprints"},{"title":"Design Systems Trends and Best Practices - 2025 edition","url":"https://www.netguru.com/blog/key-design-systems-trends-and-best-practices"}]

Here are the search results for BlueprintJS 6 design system best practices:

## BlueprintJS 6 Overview

Blueprint 6.0 focuses on the removal of deprecated and legacy code and the modernization of the codebase.

### Key Changes in Blueprint 6.0

- CSS namespace changed from bp5- to bp6-.
- React 16 and 17 are no longer supported as peer dependencies of Blueprint.
- @blueprintjs/datetime2 is now deprecated and should no longer be used. All component implementations have been merged into @blueprintjs/datetime.
- The react-day-picker dependency has changed from 7.4.9 to ^8.10.0.
- Components like `<Navbar.Divider>`, `<Navbar.Group>`, and `<Navbar.Heading>` should be replaced with `<NavbarDivider>`, `<NavbarGroup>`, and `<NavbarHeading>` instead.

### Best Practices

The Blueprint repository includes implementations for custom stylelint rules which enforce best practices for Blueprint usage.

### About Blueprint

Blueprint is a design system implemented as a collection of composable React components and optimized for desktop applications.

### Design Resources

- There's a design system modeled after Blueprint JS available on Figma.
- For accessibility, Blueprint relies on both strong contrast and iconography to convey the intent of messages.

For the complete documentation and best practices, you can visit the official Blueprint documentation at [blueprintjs.com/docs/](https://blueprintjs.com/docs/) or check the [Blueprint 6.0 migration guide](https://github.com/palantir/blueprint/wiki/Blueprint-6.0) on GitHub.
